drivers: field experience filling the DatsTech.TV product model
six analyst conclusions about rules-vs-data, retrospective, standards, domain knowledge, agent ingestion, owner validation
description: Adds content classification (kind_class), a product-level normative home (00-policies) and a shared standards baseline with inheritance, four new layers (subject domains, outcome validation, process retrospectives, ingestion bindings), the Outcome/Retrospective feedback loop, and a mandatory source-owner validation gate for derived records.

migration_steps.action: Add `kind_class` to layer specs and record templates. Default by record kind: policy/rule/proc/standard/method/recipe -> normative; trace/link/edge/index/coverage -> projection; everything else -> descriptive.
Create `00-policies/` at product-repo root (sibling of 00-meta and aismm). Move cross-cutting product policies/methods/recipes out of aismm/ data layers into it.
Tag remaining domain-local normative records with `kind_class: normative` and group them under a `_normative/` subdirectory inside their layer directory.
Create the four new layer directories under aismm/: b0/007, b1/104, b8/810, b9/907. Use empty-layer blocks where not yet populated.
Add a `derivation` block and `validation_status: unvalidated` to all agent-produced (derived) records. Route validation to owner_of_source via b9.907 bindings + b11.1102.
Create ingestion bindings in b9.907 for every agent-populated layer, referencing versioned recipes stored in 00-policies.
Adopt shared baselines via `inherits_from: standard:<id>@<version>` in 00-policies; record only deviations as `override` with reasons.
Extend b9.906 relationship taxonomy with: automates, realizes_domain, registered_as, evaluates, assesses_outcome_of, derived_from, ingested_from, attested_by, validates, disputes, inherits_from.
Update strict mode and context-security: deny unvalidated/disputed/expired derived records from authoritative context packages and from status=stable.

breaking_changes: kind_class becomes an expected field (strict mode may require it)
derived records cannot reach status=stable or enter authoritative context without owner validation
cross-cutting normative content must relocate to 00-policies
open_decisions: Normative home placement: central-only (00-policies) vs hybrid (central + tagged domain-local). v3 recommends hybrid.
Standards placement: landscape/AIPLMM-level shared repo (recommended) vs local software-meta-model-standards-main mirror.
Owner-validation gate strength: hard gate at L5 (recommended) vs advisory below L5.
notes: Not fully additive. L1/L2 repositories can defer kind_class and the validation gate; L4/L5 repositories must adopt them. The four new layers are additive and may be declared empty until populated.
